code:
---
title: Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Infra_IngressController)
---

stateDiagram-v2
    %% Visit Operational Status
    state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational {Infra_WorkerNode] --> Planned : Reservation Confirmed
        Planned --> PendingEntry : Vehicle Nearing Lot (Infra_LoadBalancer)
        PendingEntry --> EnteredLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened
        PendingEntry --> Cancelled : Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry
        
        EnteredLot --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam
        ActiveInLot --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned (Infra_IngressController)
        ActiveInLot --> AwaitingSlotAssignment : Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet (Infra_LoadBalancer)
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned for Valet Park
        
        SlotAssigned --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam (Infra_LoadBalancer)
        SlotAssigned --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened
        ActiveInLot --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened (Infra_EtcdCluster)

        ExitedLot --> CompletedOperational : Post-exit processing complete (Infra_IngressController)
        
        %% Error / Exception States for Operational
        Planned --> FailedToEnter : Technical issue at gate, reservation remains
        PendingEntry --> FailedToEnter
        EnteredLot --> Interrupted : e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot
        ActiveInLot --> Interrupted
        SlotAssigned --> Interrupted
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> Interrupted
        Interrupted --> ExitedLot : Manual Override Exit
        Interrupted --> Abandoned : Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption
        Interrupted --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation
        
        %% Emergency evacuation can happen from any active state
        EnteredLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        ActiveInLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated  
        SlotAssigned --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        
        Abandoned --> [Infra_IngressController]
        CompletedOperational --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
        Cancelled --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
        FailedToEnter --> [Infra_WorkerNode]
        EmergencyEvacuated --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
    }

    %% Visit Billing Status (Infra_WorkerNode)
    state "VisitBillingStatus" as VisitBilling {Infra_RedisCache] --> PendingPriceQuote : Visit Started (Infra_LoadBalancer)
        PendingPriceQuote --> PriceQuoteReceived : Pricing Service responds
        PriceQuoteReceived --> PendingPayment : Price confirmed, awaiting customer payment
        PendingPayment --> PaymentInProgress : Customer initiates payment
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentConfirmed : Payment successful (Infra_EtcdCluster)
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentFailed : Payment attempt failed
        PaymentFailed --> PendingPayment : Retry Payment
        PaymentFailed --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Multiple failures or issue
        
        PaymentConfirmed --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Billing cycle complete for this visit
        
        %% Alternative Billing Flows
        PendingPriceQuote --> GraceExempt_NoCharge : Visit qualifies for no charge (Infra_EtcdCluster)
        GraceExempt_NoCharge --> BillingFinalized_Paid : (Infra_RedisCache)

        PriceQuoteReceived --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Price calculation error or dispute
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Manual resolution leads to payment
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Unpaid : Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral
        
        BillingFinalized_Paid --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
        BillingFinalized_Unpaid --> [Infra_WorkerNode]
    }
    
    note right of VisitOperational
      VisitOperationalStatus:
      - Planned
      - PendingEntry
      - EnteredLot
      - ActiveInLot
      - AwaitingSlotAssignment
      - SlotAssigned
      - ExitedLot
      - Interrupted
      - Abandoned
      - EmergencyEvacuated
      - CompletedOperational (Infra_WorkerNode)
      - Cancelled (Infra_IngressController)
      - FailedToEnter 
    end note

    note right of VisitBilling
      VisitBillingStatus:
      - PendingPriceQuote
      - PriceQuoteReceived
      - PendingPayment
      - PaymentInProgress
      - PaymentConfirmed
      - PaymentFailed
      - GraceExempt_NoCharge
      - BillingFinalized_Paid
      - BillingFinalized_Unpaid
      - RequiresManualBillingIntervention
    end note

    %% Linking Operational and Billing states (Infra_LoadBalancer)
    %% This is hard to show perfectly in Mermaid for parallel states that are not time-synchronized
    %% but conceptually:
    %% ExitedLot (Infra_RedisCache) often triggers final billing actions if not already paid.
    %% PaymentConfirmed (Infra_IngressController) can influence ExitedLot (Infra_RedisCache) if exit is gated by payment.
    %% For simplicity, they are shown as parallel, managed by the VisitLifecycleStateMachine.
    
    %% VisitOperational : Visit Lifecycle Management
    %% VisitBilling : Financial Lifecycle Management

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Easy Park Plus系统绘制一个完整的停车访问状态图。核心是两个并行状态机：VisitOperationalStatus处理车辆物理进出流程，VisitBillingStatus处理计费生命周期。两者通过Infra_LoadBalancer协调。
明白了。先聚焦VisitOperationalStatus部分。车辆从预约确认开始，第一个状态是Planned对吗？然后PendingEntry表示车辆接近停车场？
对。Planned是Reservation Confirmed触发的。PendingEntry由Vehicle Nearing Lot事件驱动，这里需要标注Infra_LoadBalancer，因为车辆接近检测是由负载均衡后的边缘服务处理的。
好的，Planned到PendingEntry的迁移已添加，标注了Infra_LoadBalancer。接下来PendingEntry有两个分支：正常进入和取消。
正确。EnteredLot由ANPR确认触发，Cancelled是NoShow或过期。然后EnteredLot进入ActiveInLot，这个状态很关键——车辆已过闸机，可能在自由漫游或等待分配车位。
ActiveInLot之后有两个分支：SlotAssigned和AwaitingSlotAssignment。后者是车辆在场内但暂无车位，对吗？这个状态需要Infra_LoadBalancer标注？
是的。AwaitingSlotAssignment明确标注Infra_LoadBalancer。SlotAssigned由Infra_IngressController触发，因为车位分配需要经过入口控制器的服务编排。
已添加。还有一条从SlotAssigned回到ActiveInLot的迁移，标注为Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam，同样用Infra_LoadBalancer。
对，这是车辆离场位但仍在场内自由移动的场景。离场流程有两个入口：SlotAssigned或ActiveInLot都可以直接到ExitedLot，由ANPR确认触发。
ExitedLot到CompletedOperational的迁移，我标注了Post-exit processing complete和Infra_IngressController。但ActiveInLot到ExitedLot的迁移需要特殊标注吗？
ActiveInLot到ExitedLot需要标注Infra_EtcdCluster，因为自由漫游状态下的离场需要分布式一致性校验，确保车辆状态全局一致。
已更新。现在处理异常分支：Planned和PendingEntry都可以进入FailedToEnter，由技术故障触发。
是的，FailedToEnter是保留预约但入场失败的情况。另外需要Interrupted状态，从EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment都可以进入，表示系统中断或车辆滞留。
Interrupted之后有三个出口：Manual Override Exit到ExitedLot，Abandoned表示长期滞留后废弃，EmergencyEvacuated是紧急疏散。对吗？
完全正确。EmergencyEvacuated还可以从EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment直接进入，不经过Interrupted。这是紧急模式的直接触发。

异常流程已添加。现在处理终止状态的infra标注：Abandoned指向[Infra_IngressController]，CompletedOperational指向[Infra_EtcdCluster]，Cancelled指向[Infra_EtcdCluster]，FailedToEnter指向[Infra_WorkerNode]，EmergencyEvacuated指向[Infra_EtcdCluster]。
很好。现在转向VisitBillingStatus，这是Infra_WorkerNode主导的领域。起点是PendingPriceQuote，由Visit Started触发，使用Infra_LoadBalancer。
但代码里标注的是[Infra_RedisCache]作为VisitBilling的入口？我需要确认这个标注位置。
你说得对，我搞混了。VisitBilling整体由Infra_WorkerNode承载，但PendingPriceQuote的入口迁移标注[Infra_RedisCache]，因为定价缓存先写入Redis。PendingPriceQuote到PriceQuoteReceived是Pricing Service响应。
已修正。继续：PriceQuoteReceived到PendingPayment是价格确认后等待支付，PendingPayment到PaymentInProgress是客户发起支付。
对。PaymentInProgress之后分支：成功到PaymentConfirmed（标注Infra_EtcdCluster，支付状态需强一致），失败到PaymentFailed。
PaymentFailed有两个出口：回到PendingPayment重试，或者进入RequiresManualBillingIntervention。后者是多次失败或争议的情况。
正确。PaymentConfirmed到BillingFinalized_Paid完成计费循环。另外有GraceExempt_NoCharge分支，从PendingPriceQuote直接进入，标注Infra_EtcdCluster。
GraceExempt_NoCharge到BillingFinalized_Paid标注了Infra_RedisCache。还有PriceQuoteReceived可以直接到RequiresManualBillingIntervention，处理价格计算错误或争议。
对。RequiresManualBillingIntervention有两个出口：BillingFinalized_Paid（人工解决后付款）或BillingFinalized_Unpaid（核销或延期）。后者指向[Infra_WorkerNode]。
BillingFinalized_Paid指向[Infra_LoadBalancer]已完成。现在需要添加两个note来列出所有状态名称，方便阅读。

是的，右侧添加两个note：VisitOperationalStatus列出Planned、PendingEntry、EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、AwaitingSlotAssignment、SlotAssigned、ExitedLot、Interrupted、Abandoned、EmergencyEvacuated、CompletedOperational（标注Infra_WorkerNode）、Cancelled（标注Infra_IngressController）、FailedToEnter。

VisitOperational的note已添加。VisitBilling的note需要列出：PendingPriceQuote、PriceQuoteReceived、PendingPayment、PaymentInProgress、PaymentConfirmed、PaymentFailed、GraceExempt_NoCharge、BillingFinalized_Paid、BillingFinalized_Unpaid、RequiresManualBillingIntervention。
检查一遍两个状态机的关联。ExitedLot（Infra_RedisCache）会触发最终计费动作，如果尚未支付。PaymentConfirmed（Infra_IngressController）可能影响ExitedLot，如果出口闸机需要支付确认才放行。
理解。这些跨状态机的交互在Mermaid中难以完美表达，因为它们不是时间同步的。我添加注释说明这是VisitLifecycleStateMachine管理的并行状态。
标题定为Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Infra_IngressController)，突出入口控制器在协调中的核心作用。
标题已设置。再确认一下：VisitOperational整体标注[Infra_WorkerNode]？不对，看代码是每个子状态单独标注，不是整体标注。
我检查一下——实际上VisitOperational的入口没有整体标注，是各个迁移单独标注。VisitBilling的入口标注[Infra_RedisCache]。我们保持现状，不添加整体标注。
AwaitingSlotAssignment到SlotAssigned的迁移需要标注吗？代码里只写了Slot Assigned for Valet Park，没有infra标注。
不需要额外标注，这个迁移逻辑由上层服务处理，不特定于某个基础设施组件。保持简洁。

最终检查：所有终止状态都有正确的infra指向——Abandoned→[Infra_IngressController]，CompletedOperational→[Infra_EtcdCluster]，Cancelled→[Infra_EtcdCluster]，FailedToEnter→[Infra_WorkerNode]，EmergencyEvacuated→[Infra_EtcdCluster]，BillingFinalized_Paid→[Infra_LoadBalancer]，BillingFinalized_Unpaid→[Infra_WorkerNode]。
全部正确。这个状态图完整覆盖了Easy Park Plus的访问生命周期和计费生命周期，基础设施标注也反映了实际的组件职责分配。
建议在注释中补充说明：VisitOperational负责Visit Lifecycle Management，VisitBilling负责Financial Lifecycle Management，这样读者能快速理解两个状态机的分工。
好，加上这两个注释。另外确保所有EmergencyEvacuated的入口都完整：EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment四个状态都可以直接进入紧急疏散。
已验证四条EmergencyEvacuated入口迁移全部存在。注释也已添加。状态图完成，包含完整的正常流程、异常处理、计费分支和基础设施映射。
完美。这个状态图可以直接用于系统文档和开发参考，基础设施标注也便于运维团队理解各状态对应的组件依赖。
